features: The hydrating capability along with the light, non-greasy formulation helps dry skin all year round
description: The hydrating capability along with the light, non-greasy formulation helps dry skin all year round. Dermatologically tested, lanolin free and fragrance free. The aqueous cream is effectively ointment and water combined to produce a moisturiser for everyone to use. Nuage Aqueous Cream is a non-greasy moisturise. Perfect for treating very dry skin; particularly dermatitis, eczema, chapped sore skin especially during winter months. Suitable for use on the body and to treat and prevent dry chapped lips. Nuage® is a trusted popular brand, search amazon.co.uk to view other available products. Large, contains 500ml.
